(41) Patient Discharged Against Medical Advice CHAR 1 A code indicating whether the patient was discharged against medical advice. 0 = No, 1 = Yes
154 _42 PGM_INTRPTN_SW (42) Program Interruption(s) CHAR 1 A code indicating whether the Medicare inpatient is discharged from the inpatient rehabilitation facility and returns to the same inpatient rehabilitation facility within 3 consecutive calendar days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes
